_comment_top: R6 task 103 (D-H-03, FR-16) — seed row for the ClauseComparisonHandler typed handler.
_comment_routing: Runtime invocation routes to the C# class via sprk_handlerclass = 'ClauseComparisonHandler' (= nameof handler class).
_comment_consumption: Read by scripts/Seed-TypedHandlers.ps1. Idempotent — script queries by sprk_toolcode first; UPSERTs.
_comment_toolcode: R6 audit item 4 (2026-06-07): sprk_toolcode column extended manually from 10 to 100 chars. Renamed from 'CLAUSE-CMP@v1' to descriptive 'CLAUSE-COMPARISON'. NO @v1 suffix per cross-environment migration policy.
sprk_description: Pure-deterministic structural text-diff between two clauses (clauseA + clauseB) at configurable granularity (word / sentence / paragraph). Emits ordered segments (added / removed / unchanged / modified) plus a normalized similarity score [0.0, 1.0]. Case- + punctuation- + whitespace-normalization configurable. NO LLM call.
_comment_availableincontexts: 100000000 = Playbook (this handler is invoked from Playbook nodes — typically after upstream extraction provides clauseA + clauseB; no chat-direct invocation in R6).

granularity.description: Diff granularity. Sentence and paragraph preserve structural boundaries; word is the finest.

punctuationSensitive.description: When false, '.', ',', ';' etc. are stripped before token comparison.

normalizeWhitespace.description: When true (default), runs of whitespace collapse to a single space before tokenization.

_comment_configuration: Default policy: sentence-level granularity, case-insensitive, whitespace-normalized, punctuation-aware. Per-invocation requests supply clauseA + clauseB and may override granularity / sensitivity flags.
